title: Aaron Aboagye's Framework for Ethical AI Policy
description: A flowchart illustrating the key components and their interactions in Aboagye's proposed approach to developing ethical and effective public policy for Artificial Intelligence.
elements: Core Ethical Principles (e.g., Transparency, Fairness, Accountability)
relationships: Core Ethical Principles inform and are upheld by Policy Levers
Stakeholder Engagement provides input for creating and refining Policy Levers
Policy Levers are implemented and their outcomes are measured via Continuous Monitoring
Results from Monitoring create a Feedback loop to adapt Principles and Policy Levers
